<think> I know that Cold Mountain is a novel by Charles Frazier, and it's a historical fiction novel that won the National Book Award in 2007. I also recall that the novel is set during the American Civil War and follows the story of a wounded Confederate soldier who embarks on a journey to return home to his love. I'm not aware of any other notable works with the same title, so I'm confident that Charles Frazier is the author of the novel. </think>
<answer> Charles Frazier </answer>
